subject: Stoutland, a large shaggy dog Pokémon with a prominent mustache-like facial fur, standing in an outdoor setting
description: A large, stocky quadruped canine with very long, dense fur stands facing forward in what appears to be an outdoor grassy or field setting. The creature has a distinctive long moustache-like facial fur that extends outward from its muzzle, and large expressive eyes. Its body is covered in thick shaggy brown and cream-colored fur. The art style is polished and detailed, consistent with official Pokémon TCG illustration. The mood is calm and noble — the creature appears trustworthy and sturdy, in keeping with its flavor text as a rescue partner.
foreground: large shaggy dog with prominent facial fur, thick coat, standing
background: outdoor setting, light sky, grassy ground
emotion: calm, noble, trustworthy — sturdy stance, gentle expression
